title: viola palmata var. esculenta
intro: Viola palmata var. esculenta, also known as the European yellow violet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is a perennial herb used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help reduce pain and alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation. Additionally, the plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions like sore throats, fever, and skin irritations, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine.
